description: Croque Madame is a French hot sandwich made with bread, ham, cheese, and béchamel sauce, then topped with a fried or poached egg. It is closely related to the croque monsieur.
preparation_steps: Assemble the sandwich with bread, ham, cheese, and often béchamel.
Toast or bake until hot and the cheese is melted.
Top with a fried or poached egg.

health_advice.benefits: Provides protein and is substantial enough for a meal.
health_advice.risks: Can be high in saturated fat and sodium because of cheese, ham, and sauce.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Serve with salad and keep the sauce and cheese at moderate levels.

dietary_notes.note: Traditional versions include ham and egg. Vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free versions are possible with substitutions, but they are no longer traditional.
